mapper.select: SELECT count( DISTINCT t1.quotation_id ) qnum, count( t2.goods_id ) goodsnum, sum( CASE WHEN t2.STATUS = '2' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ) normalnum, spu_no, dept_id FROM store_goods_quotation t1, store_goods_quotation_goods t2 WHERE t1.quotation_id = t2.quotation_id AND t1.status = '1' AND t2.status != '0' AND t1.dept_id = #{deptId} GROUP BY spu_no, dept_id;

SELECT sum( CASE WHEN status = '2' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) normalNum, sum( CASE WHEN status = '3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) goodsNum, sum( CASE WHEN status = '4' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) finishNum, sum( CASE WHEN status = '5' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) qnum FROM store_goods_order t1 WHERE t1.status IN ('2','3','4','5') AND t1.create_time >= #{startDate} AND t1.create_time <= #{endDate} AND t1.dept_id = #{deptId}

SELECT merchant_id, spu_no, sum(t2.sorting_price) orderTotalPrice FROM store_goods_order t1, store_goods_order_item t2 WHERE t1.order_id = t2.order_id AND t1.STATUS IN ('3','4') AND merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND t1.create_time >= #{startDate} AND t1.create_time <= #{endDate} GROUP BY t2.spu_no, t1.merchant_id
